_comment: Source file. The root app.json is generated from this file by homeycompose.

description.en: Control your Tuya Zigbee + WiFi devices locally! 138 drivers, 5,579 device fingerprints, 1,457+ flow cards. Switches, sensors, lights, thermostats, covers, locks & more. 100% local, hybrid Tuya DP + ZCL.
description.nl: Bedien je Tuya Zigbee + WiFi apparaten lokaal! 138 drivers, 5.579 apparaatvingerafdrukken, 1.457+ flowkaarten. Schakelaars, sensoren, lampen, thermostaten, rolluiken, sloten en meer. 100% lokaal.
description.de: Steuern Sie Ihre Tuya Zigbee + WiFi-Geräte lokal! 138 Treiber, 5.579 Geräte-Fingerprints, 1.457+ Flow-Karten. Schalter, Sensoren, Lampen, Thermostate, Rollläden, Schlösser und mehr. 100% lokal.
description.fr: Contrôlez vos appareils Tuya Zigbee + WiFi localement ! 138 drivers, 5 579 empreintes d'appareils, 1 457+ cartes de flux. Interrupteurs, capteurs, lumières, thermostats, volets, serrures et plus. 100% local.
